c.d: The ability for users to rate and review movies, providing personal insights and opinions.
Features that allow users to connect with friends, share ratings, and discover movies through social interactions.
The app's capability to suggest movies based on user preferences and viewing history.
The design and usability of the app, ensuring a seamless and engaging user experience.
The availability of the app across different platforms such as iOS, Android, and web.
